issues.description:
Verify and decide on [DEV-349](mention://issue/3eee1894-aa96-4d7f-aa38-b0e039e02841).

Steps:
1. Read the parent issue body + all comments.
2. Run `security-review-checklist` — this is user-facing (punch/leave API with JWT auth, geofence, selfie upload).
3. Check every item in the Definition of Done checklist:
   - All 6 Edge Functions deploy without errors
   - `/punch` rejects double-punch within 30 seconds
   - `/punch` outside geofence returns 422/403 OUTSIDE_GEOFENCE
   - `/punch-sync` deduplicates by `client_punch_id` (idempotent)
   - `/leave-approve` creates audit_log entry on approval/rejection
   - `/report-daily` returns correct JSON for authenticated HR Manager JWT
   - `openapi.yaml` validates against OpenAPI 3.1 spec

Decision:
- PASS (DoD met, no security issues) → `multica issue status 3eee1894-aa96-4d7f-aa38-b0e039e02841 done`
- VETO (DoD not met or security failure) → `multica issue status 3eee1894-aa96-4d7f-aa38-b0e039e02841 backlog` + `multica issue metadata set 3eee1894-aa96-4d7f-aa38-b0e039e02841 --key blocked_reason --value "<reason>"`

Post your verdict as a comment on the parent issue.
issues.title: QA Gate: DEV-349 — BUILD: Implement Supabase Edge Functions (punch, sync, reports, FCM)

issues.description:
Gate 3 (final) QA for [DEV-350](mention://issue/311411b9-4454-49ab-b863-fcabc2efadfc) — the last remaining blocker has been addressed by [DEV-366](mention://issue/6a20fff6-2529-483c-ad8e-127a39b5744d).

## What changed since Gate 2

**CRUD form validation implemented** (DEV-366, delivered 2026-07-01T08:57:46Z):

| Route | Schema file | Schema variable |
|-------|-------------|-----------------|
| `/employees` | `src/lib/validation/employees.ts` | `employeeSchema` |
| `/offices` | `src/lib/validation/offices.ts` | `officeSchema` |
| `/shifts` | `src/lib/validation/shifts.ts` | `shiftSchema` |

Schemas enforce: employee PII field constraints, GPS coordinate ranges (lat [-90,90], lng [-180,180]), radius positive integer, time format `HH:MM`, grace minutes non-negative. Wired into `handleSave()` in all three client components — Supabase write is blocked until schema parses. TypeScript: 0 errors, 0 warnings.

## Full picture going into Gate 3

All prior gates' blockers are now resolved:
- ✅ Gate 1 B1: Loading/empty/error states on all 8 data pages (DEV-362)
- ✅ Gate 1 B2: Component library documented — custom primitives, no Radix UI (DEV-362)
- ✅ Gate 2 B1: CRUD form Zod validation on /employees, /offices, /shifts (DEV-366)
- ⚠️ RLS — waived, tracked as DEV-364 (pre-production required)
- ⚠️ Rate limiting — waived, tracked as DEV-363 (pre-production required)

QGM forecast from Gate 2: "Once confirmed with code references, score moves to 11/12 → ACCEPT."

## Steps

1. Verify Zod schemas at the paths listed above exist and are wired into the three CRUD modals.
2. Confirm `tsc --noEmit` still passes (0 errors in DEV-366 delivery).
3. Run `security-review-checklist` — confirm item #5 (input validation) now PASSES.
4. Confirm no regressions introduced by the validation wiring.

## Decision

- **PASS** → `multica issue status 311411b9-4454-49ab-b863-fcabc2efadfc done` + `multica issue status 6a20fff6-2529-483c-ad8e-127a39b5744d done`
- **VETO** → `multica issue status 311411b9-4454-49ab-b863-fcabc2efadfc backlog` + `multica issue metadata set 311411b9-4454-49ab-b863-fcabc2efadfc --key blocked_reason --value "<reason>"`

Post your verdict as a comment on DEV-350.
issues.title: QA Gate 3: DEV-350 — Verify CRUD Zod validation (Gate 3 of 3, forecast ACCEPT)
